name: New start for 2025
description:
2025 has officially begun and this year will be some changes for us here in the Jelly community 👏🏾

First things first, the main thing:

I currently have 5 commissions left. Once I have finished all my commissions, I will be taking a step back from my hockey boys. I repeat, from my HOCKEY BOYS. I'm not quitting!

I love my boys and can't imagine how I would have gotten here without them and I'm so glad you all like them too but I strive to make new content and not just be a Hockey creator alone, I want to make other characters and series that will get as much love as these boys did. No it doesn't mean they're gonna be gone forever, it just means they're taking a break, think of it like preparing for a season 2 or something.

I will eventually bring them back and just like the black diamonds, the lions will be getting new cards and refixed personality sheets to be cleaner and more consistent with all the lore I've created for them since their debut.

I have so many ideas I wanna share, a series I've been preparing for on the side that I do hope y'all will show love to as much as my hockey boys have gotten and my one off characters that I want to give more chances to.

That being said, I'm still iffy on opening my Ko-fi again too, if I do, it would be for new character commissions and I would no longer do hockey commissions. That's still debatable

I wanted those to know, who aren't apart of my discord server if these changes that will be coming. I've appreciated all of your love and support and motivation since I became a bot creator and heres to 2025 being filled with just as much support and motivation!
creator: Jellysproutking
